title: Cooktop
prompt: Which cooktop results in lower greenhouse gas emissions?
explanation: Switching from a gas cooktop to an induction cooktop can cut stove-related emissions by ~640 kg CO2 per year.

title: Light Bulbs
prompt: Which light bulb type results in lower greenhouse gas emissions?
explanation: Replacing 30 incandescent bulbs with 30 LED lamps reduces emissions by ~1,800 kg CO2 per year.

title: Water Heater
prompt: Which water heater results in lower greenhouse gas emissions?
explanation: Switching from a gas water heater to a heat pump water heater reduces emissions by ~900 kg CO2 per year.

title: Drying
prompt: Which drying method results in lower greenhouse gas emissions?
explanation: Switching from a dryer to air drying reduces emissions by ~1,000 kg CO2 per year.
